name: product-research-skills
description: Amazon-FBA product-research skills for Claude — Discovery, Cost, and Review, plus a combined build/test/pass dossier. Real marketplace data, no fabrication.

plugins.name: product-opportunity-finder
plugins.description: Discovery — turn an Amazon category into a ranked Top-3 niche shortlist (Helium 10 Black Box + deterministic scoring).

plugins.name: product-cost-analyze
plugins.description: Cost — is a product profitable, and at what price? Real 1688 FOB + Profitlee FBA fee math → ranked margin report.

plugins.name: product-review-analyze
plugins.description: Review — mine competitor reviews + Helium 10 market layer → GO/WATCH/SKIP verdict, plus a combined three-phase dossier.
